application/json Body = {"code":0,"message":"Consulta realizada exitosamente","userMessage":"Operación realizada exitosamente","data":{"content":[{"id":1,"code":"ADMIN","name":"Administrador","description":"Administración total de la plataforma","active":true,"permissionCodes":["assignments:create","assignments:delete","assignments:read","assignments:update","catalogs:admin","committee:read","kanban:create","kanban:delete","kanban:read","kanban:update","logs:create","logs:delete","logs:read","migration:execute","okrs:read","okrs:update","project-updates:create","project-updates:delete","project-updates:read","projects:create","projects:delete","projects:read","projects:update","reports:read","security:admin","teams:create","teams:delete","teams:read","teams:update"]},{"id":5,"code":"VIEWER","name":"Consulta","description":"Solo lectura","active":true,"permissionCodes":["assignments:read","committee:read","kanban:read","logs:read","okrs:read","project-updates:read","projects:read","reports:read","teams:read"]},{"id":2,"code":"COORDINATOR","name":"Coordinador","description":"Gestión integral de portafolio y seguimiento","active":true,"permissionCodes":["assignments:create","assignments:delete","assignments:read","assignments:update","catalogs:admin","committee:read","kanban:create","kanban:delete","kanban:read","kanban:update","logs:create","logs:delete","logs:read","migration:execute","okrs:read","okrs:update","project-updates:create","project-updates:delete","project-updates:read","projects:create","projects:delete","projects:read","projects:update","reports:read","teams:create","teams:delete","teams:read","teams:update"]},{"id":4,"code":"EXECUTIVE","name":"Ejecutivo","description":"Consulta ejecutiva y vista comité","active":true,"permissionCodes":["assignments:read","committee:read","kanban:read","logs:read","okrs:read","project-updates:read","projects:read","reports:read","teams:read"]},{"id":3,"code":"TECH_LEAD","name":"Líder técnico","description":"Gestión de proyectos asignados y actividades","active":true,"permissionCodes":["assignments:read","kanban:create","kanban:read","kanban:update","logs:create","logs:read","okrs:read","project-updates:create","project-updates:read","projects:read","teams:read"]}],"page":0,"size":50,"totalElements":5,"totalPages":1}} Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = []

X-Content-Type-Options:"nosniff", X-XSS-Protection:"0", Cache-Control:"no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate", Pragma:"no-cache", Expires:"0", X-Frame-Options:"DENY"] Content type = application/json Body = {"code":0,"message":"Consulta realizada exitosamente","userMessage":"Operación realizada exitosamente","data":[{"module":"assignments","label":"Assignments","permissions":[{"id":17,"code":"assignments:create","module":"assignments","action":"create","description":"Crear asignaciones","active":true},{"id":19,"code":"assignments:delete","module":"assignments","action":"delete","description":"Eliminar asignaciones","active":true},{"id":16,"code":"assignments:read","module":"assignments","action":"read","description":"Consultar asignaciones","active":true},{"id":18,"code":"assignments:update","module":"assignments","action":"update","description":"Actualizar asignaciones","active":true}]},{"module":"catalogs","label":"Catalogs","permissions":[{"id":29,"code":"catalogs:admin","module":"catalogs","action":"admin","description":"Administrar catálogos","active":true}]},{"module":"committee","label":"Committee","permissions":[{"id":25,"code":"committee:read","module":"committee","action":"read","description":"Consultar vista comité","active":true}]},{"module":"kanban","label":"Kanban","permissions":[{"id":9,"code":"kanban:create","module":"kanban","action":"create","description":"Crear actividades Kanban","active":true},{"id":11,"code":"kanban:delete","module":"kanban","action":"delete","description":"Eliminar actividades Kanban","active":true},{"id":8,"code":"kanban:read","module":"kanban","action":"read","description":"Consultar Kanban","active":true},{"id":10,"code":"kanban:update","module":"kanban","action":"update","description":"Actualizar actividades Kanban","active":true}]},{"module":"logs","label":"Logs","permissions":[{"id":23,"code":"logs:create","module":"logs","action":"create","description":"Crear bitácora","active":true},{"id":24,"code":"logs:delete","module":"logs","action":"delete","description":"Eliminar bitácora","active":true},{"id":22,"code":"logs:read","module":"logs","action":"read","description":"Consultar bitácora","active":true}]},{"module":"migration","label":"Migration","permissions":[{"id":27,"code":"migration:execute","module":"migration","action":"execute","description":"Ejecutar migraciones legacy","active":true}]},{"module":"okrs","label":"Okrs","permissions":[{"id":20,"code":"okrs:read","module":"okrs","action":"read","description":"Consultar OKRs","active":true},{"id":21,"code":"okrs:update","module":"okrs","action":"update","description":"Actualizar OKRs","active":true}]},{"module":"project-updates","label":"Project updates","permissions":[{"id":6,"code":"project-updates:create","module":"project-updates","action":"create","description":"Crear actualizaciones append-only","active":true},{"id":7,"code":"project-updates:delete","module":"project-updates","action":"delete","description":"Ocultar actualizaciones administrativamente","active":true},{"id":5,"code":"project-updates:read","module":"project-updates","action":"read","description":"Consultar actualizaciones","active":true}]},{"module":"projects","label":"Projects","permissions":[{"id":2,"code":"projects:create","module":"projects","action":"create","description":"Crear proyectos","active":true},{"id":4,"code":"projects:delete","module":"projects","action":"delete","description":"Eliminar proyectos","active":true},{"id":1,"code":"projects:read","module":"projects","action":"read","description":"Consultar proyectos","active":true},{"id":3,"code":"projects:update","module":"projects","action":"update","description":"Actualizar proyectos","active":true}]},{"module":"reports","label":"Reports","permissions":[{"id":26,"code":"reports:read","module":"reports","action":"read","description":"Consultar reportes","active":true}]},{"module":"security","label":"Security","permissions":[{"id":28,"code":"security:admin","module":"security","action":"admin","description":"Administrar seguridad","active":true}]},{"module":"teams","label":"Teams","permissions":[{"id":13,"code":"teams:create","module":"teams","action":"create","description":"Crear miembros","active":true},{"id":15,"code":"teams:delete","module":"teams","action":"delete","description":"Eliminar miembros","active":true},{"id":12,"code":"teams:read","module":"teams","action":"read","description":"Consultar equipos","active":true},{"id":14,"code":"teams:update","module":"teams","action":"update","description":"Actualizar miembros","active":true}]}]} Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies =
